name: FileUpload
playroomSnippet:
<FileUpload
            name="file"
            asset={<IconExportRegular color="currentColor" />}
            title="Upload your file"
            description="File can be up to 50Mb"
            renderButton={(props) => (
                <ButtonPrimary {...props}>
                    Choose file
                </ButtonPrimary>
            )}
        />
